name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
🎸| Who knew tweeting a simple happy birthday post to your favorite idol would lead to you receiving a DM from them?

TW: power dynamic? intro that leads into nsfw, very dubious consent that can lead to noncon, secret relationship

A/N: kinda based off of japanese oshi, gachikoi, and idol culture. erm can you tell it's a special interest of mine??? actually don't answer that... it's rlly obvious i yapped a ton in the initial msg. maybe I yapped a bit too much. this bot feels super unoriginal😭
